content: I, Vikram Mehta, resident of House No. 12, Sector 48, Noida, Uttar Pradesh, hereby lodge this First Information Report regarding the kidnapping of my 12-year-old son, Arjun Mehta. On 15th October 2023, at approximately 15:05 hours, Arjun was taken from outside Noida Public School by two masked men on a motorcycle. The incident was witnessed by several school staff and students. One of the kidnappers forced Arjun into a black SUV parked near the school gate. The vehicle was registered to me, but I did not authorize its use at that time. Shortly after, I received a message via the encrypted app Signal demanding ₹2.5 crore in cash, to be delivered at the forested area near Sector 57 by 18:00 hours. The message threatened harm to Arjun if the police were involved. I immediately contacted the police and cooperated fully. Arjun’s smartwatch signal dropped at 15:10 near the Noida-Greater Noida Expressway. No ransom has been paid. I request immediate investigation and protection for my family. I have no knowledge of any person involved and have no grudges against anyone. I have attached copies of the ransom message and Arjun’s smartwatch location history.
